title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at American Institute - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at American Institute - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the American Institute family as a Curriculum Developer in Tiruchirappalli. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About American Institute:
American Institute is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Support students with special educational needs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with American Institute!
